case_title: LARRY ZOGLIN ET AL VS. PRINCESS CRUISE LINES, LTD.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LARRY ZOGLIN WAS PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZOGLIN, LARRY HUNTER, SONJA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES, LTD. $8,736.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,826.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZOGLIN, LARRY HUNTER, SONJA AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES, LTD.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-19-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES, LTD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,736.00 FILED BY ZOGLIN, LARRY HUNTER, SONJA AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES, LTD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
